entry.title: IDC W91CRB16D5006 (P00020) awarded to HARRIS GLOBAL COMMUNICATIONS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: W4GV USA HQ COMM ELECT CMD

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Only the US Army CECOM FMS team can place delivery orders against this contract.

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MOD P00020 ADDS CLAUSES RELATED TO INTERIM FAR RULE 2019-009 "PROHIBITION ON CONTRACTING WITH ENTITIES USING CERTAIN TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND VIDEO SURVEILLANCE SERVICES OR EQUIPMENT"

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT, AIRBORNE

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
